title: Test Display for Percentage
scenario: Formatting is public behavior. A small table keeps display expectations obvious.
instructions: Keep the existing valid and invalid tests. Implement Display for Percentage and add a table-driven display test.

hints.body: Implement std::fmt::Display for Percentage with output like "42%".
Add formats_percentages to the existing tests module and loop over cases such as (0, "0%"), (50, "50%"), and (100, "100%").
One complete solution for Test Display for Percentage is shown below.

completionExplanation: Percentage now has a Display implementation and table-driven coverage for its public formatting behavior.
